dept.name: Department of Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing

home.page_title: Department of Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing - Faculty of Nursing, Mahidol University
home.title:
Mental Health and
Psychiatric Nursing
home.subtitle: Focusing on psychiatric and mental health nursing education, research for knowledge and innovation, and rendering high quality academic services for the psychological well-being of the public.
home.programs_desc: Providing nursing education at both undergraduate and graduate levels with modern learning innovations, centering on learners to foster quality and ethical nursing graduates.
home.research_desc: Promoting research to build knowledge and innovation in mental health and psychiatric nursing, acting as a leader of change in mental health promotion.
home.services_desc: Integrating psychiatric nursing practice knowledge to benefit society, continuously strengthening national and international academic and professional collaborations.

about.page_title: About Us | Department of Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing, Faculty of Nursing, Mahidol University
about.title: About Us
about.p1: Welcome to the Department of Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing
about.p2: Mental health and psychiatric nursing is both an art and a science dedicated to promoting, preventing, treating, and rehabilitating the mental health of patients to achieve balance and well-being in their lives.
about.p3: Originally established as the Psychiatric Nursing Unit under the Department of Medical and Psychiatric Nursing, it was later approved as an independent department within the Faculty of Nursing. Officially announced in the Royal Gazette on February 6, 1986, it became the 7th department of the Faculty of Nursing.

vision.title: Missions | Department of Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing, Faculty of Nursing, Mahidol University
vision.intro: The Department of Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing focuses on 4 main missions to drive the organization toward international excellence in nursing education and practice.
vision.m1_desc: Provide mental health and psychiatric nursing courses for undergraduate and graduate students, cultivating academic excellence, moral integrity, and professional ethics.
vision.m2_desc: Produce high-quality national and international research and academic work in mental health and psychiatric nursing.
vision.m3_desc: Offer academic services to promote mental health for students, staff, and the public, collaborating with specialized institutes to train nurse specialists.
vision.m4_desc: Preserve arts, culture, and the environment, promoting the integration of cultural dimensions in nursing practice and daily life to support well-being.

teaching.title: Teaching & Learning | Department of Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing, Faculty of Nursing, Mahidol University
teaching.intro: The Department offers courses for undergraduate and graduate students in Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing. We emphasize student-centered learning, developing up-to-date knowledge and practical skills that align with the context of Thai society for continuous personal growth and well-being.

research.title: Research | Department of Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing, Faculty of Nursing, Mahidol University
research.intro: The Department's research direction focuses on critical mental health issues in Thailand, particularly depressive disorders. Continuous research has been conducted to develop healthcare systems and nursing care guidelines for high-risk populations across all age groups. In addition, research is carried out to build expertise in symptom management and care for schizophrenic patients, substance abusers, and individuals with psychosexual problems. The department has also initiated research on care for children with four major psychiatric conditions: ADHD, Autism, Learning Disabilities, and Intellectual Disabilities. The knowledge generated from research is utilized to enhance the quality and efficiency of both education and nursing practices.

academic.title: Academic Services | Department of Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing, Faculty of Nursing, Mahidol University
academic.intro: The Department of Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing is dedicated to translating our expertise and specialized knowledge into practical academic services for society, supporting mental health care and well-being of the public across all lifespans while building solid professional networks at both national and international levels.
academic.p1_desc_1: Offer counseling programs to staff, students, and the general public.
academic.p1_desc_2: Provide online consultation via Line Official Account "NS พลังใจ"
academic.p1_desc_3: Contact via tel. 089-6861316 or the Department's Facebook page.
academic.p2_desc_1: Act as consultants for research and academic projects for external organizations.
academic.p2_desc_2: Co-develop nursing practice guidelines for various hospitals.
academic.p3_desc_1: Collaborate with Department of Mental Health (Galya Rajanagarindra, Somdet Chaopraya, Srithanya) to organize specialized training programs.
academic.p3_desc_2: Collaborate with Yuwaprasart Waithayopathum Child Psychiatric Hospital to develop child and adolescent training curricula.
academic.p4_desc_1: Organize psychology and psychiatric practical training for professional nurses.
academic.p4_desc_2: Offer courses on mental health support for chronic illnesses and community psychiatry.

coe.title: Academic Center of Excellence | Department of Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing, Faculty of Nursing, Mahidol University
coe.desc: The Center of Excellence for Prevention and Caring for Persons with Depressive Symptoms was endorsed by the Department of Psychiatric and Mental Health Nursing in March 2008. The Center is dedicated to providing education, research, and nursing services to meet the challenges of prevention and caring for persons with depressive symptoms and their families.

gallery.title: Gallery | Department of Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing, Faculty of Nursing, Mahidol University
gallery.card1_title: MHPN Faculty Members win Honorable Mention Award for "PsyMed BG" at Nursing Education Quality Fair 2026
gallery.art1_title: MHPN Faculty Members win Honorable Mention Award for "PsyMed BG" at Nursing Education Quality Fair 2026
gallery.art1_p1: On June 19, 2026, faculty members from the Department of Mental Health and Psychiatric Nursing, Faculty of Nursing, Mahidol University, led by Associate Professor Dr. Walailak Pumpuang, along with Associate Professor Dr. Wareerat Thanoi, Assistant Professor Dr. Chanya Thunyadee, and Assistant Professor Sathaka Pimroon, participated in the presentation and received the Honorable Mention Award for "PsyMed BG: Psychiatric Medication Learning Board Game for Nursing Students" at the "Nursing Education Quality Fair 2026" held at Phatra Maharajakarun Conference Room, Faculty of Nursing, Mahidol University, Salaya.
gallery.art1_p2: The event was organized as a national platform for presenting projects and exchanging knowledge on nursing education quality development. Over 250 executives, faculty members, and staff from nursing education institutions nationwide attended to jointly drive the standards of Thai nursing education toward international levels.
gallery.art1_p3: "PsyMed BG: Psychiatric Medication Learning Board Game for Nursing Students" is a learning management innovation aimed at enhancing understanding of psychiatric medications through a board game format. It helps increase engagement, stimulate analytical thinking, and improve the learning experience of nursing students, reflecting the commitment of the Faculty of Nursing, Mahidol University, to developing education quality and creating instructional innovations to produce high-quality nursing graduates who meet future social demands.
